title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers Advisory Limited family as a Full Stack Developer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
